pdg_node.informal_desc: Validates inputs, calculates algorithm parameters from the sampling rate (e.g., window sizes, refractory periods), and initializes empty buffers for storing peak amplitudes and RR intervals.

pdg_node.statement: (signal: np.ndarray, sampling_rate: float, sm_size: int) -> np.ndarray
pdg_node.informal_desc: Applies band-pass filtering, differentiation, and smoothing to the raw ECG signal to create a feature signal where QRS complexes are prominent.

pdg_node.statement: (feature_signal: np.ndarray, params: dict, qrs_peak_buffer: np.ndarray) -> tuple[np.ndarray, np.ndarray, float]
pdg_node.informal_desc: Finds all peaks in the feature signal, bootstraps the detection process by analyzing the initial signal segment to populate the QRS peak buffer, and computes the first detection threshold.

pdg_node.statement: (signal: np.ndarray, feature_signal: np.ndarray, all_peaks: np.ndarray, initial_detection_threshold: float, qrs_peak_buffer: np.ndarray, noise_peak_buffer: np.ndarray, rr_interval_buffer: np.ndarray, params: dict) -> np.ndarray
pdg_node.informal_desc: Performs core QRS detection by iterating through all candidate peaks. It applies rules to classify peaks, reject artifacts (e.g., T-waves), search for missed beats, and dynamically updates the detection threshold.

declaration.name: iteratively_classify_peaks

pdg_node.statement: (beat_indices: np.ndarray, signal: np.ndarray, params: dict) -> list[int]
pdg_node.informal_desc: Corrects the location of each detected beat by analyzing the morphology of the raw signal in a local window, identifying the true R-peak as the most significant local extremum.

declaration.name: refine_r_peak_locations
declaration.type_signature: (beat_indices: np.ndarray, signal: np.ndarray, params: dict) -> list[int]
declaration.docstring: Corrects the location of each detected beat by analyzing the morphology of the raw signal in a local window, identifying the true R-peak as the most significant local extremum.

pdg_node.informal_desc: Takes the list of refined R-peak locations, removes duplicates, sorts them chronologically, and returns the final result as a NumPy array of integers.

declaration.name: format_output_peaks
declaration.docstring: Takes the list of refined R-peak locations, removes duplicates, sorts them chronologically, and returns the final result as a NumPy array of integers.
